message:
fix(messaging): ControlRecovery must widen repair, not reject new work

ControlRecovery service class fell through to the RejectNew catchall
in degradation_disposition(), contradicting its 'must stay live' doc.
Under overload, control/recovery traffic would be rejected instead of
gracefully degraded. Added explicit WidenRepair arm merged with
LeaseRepair. Also made priority_score() use saturating_add() and added
regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
